title: Clearer Nether Wart Growth
description: Visually distinct textures for each Nether Wart growth stage and a more full final stage texture.
body:
Changes Nether Wart to have **distinct textures** for each growth stage and a **more full final stage** texture (just like pre-1.14). This texture was created by JAPPA and included in developmental versions of the Texture Update, but it did not make the full release for some reason. I personally find it difficult to tell if Nether Wart is fully grown in Vanilla, and this pack makes it much easier. ## ### MintRefresh:
